channel.title: New local problems on FixMyStreet
channel.description: The latest local problems reported by users

item.title: Hole in pavement, 6th April
item.description:
Water meter cover broken. Reported over 2 months ago to Thames water but no action. Easy to trip over.
Nearest road to the pin placed on the map (automatically generated by OpenStreetMap): 7, Blyth Road, Plaistow, Greater London
Report on FixMyStreet

item.title: Overflowing commercial bins and a huge pile of bin bags, 6th April
item.description:
17 Queensway

Nearest address to the pin placed on the map (from OS Places API): Queensway, Enfield
Report on FixMyStreet

item.title: Pothole affecting vehicles passing through, 6th April
item.description:
Pothole affecting vehicles passing through

Nearest road to the pin placed on the map (automatically generated by OpenStreetMap): Townley Road, Bexley, Greater London
Report on FixMyStreet

item.title: A mattress dumped on pavement, 6th April
item.description:
Northfield Road opposite the junction with Chester Gardens EN3 A mattress dumped on footway. Please remove as it will encourage further dumping.

Nearest address to the pin placed on the map (from OS Places API): Oxford Road, Enfield
Report on FixMyStreet

item.title: Bulky household waste dumped outside houses., 6th April
item.description:
Over a period of time, my neighbour has consistently placed bulky household items—such as furniture—outside without arranging proper collection or notifying the council. These items are often left on the street or pavement for extended periods.

Nearest address to the pin placed on the map (from OS Places API): Blurton Road, Hackney, London
Report on FixMyStreet

item.title: Sapling tree damaged, 6th April
item.description:
Sapling tree damaged

Nearest road to the pin placed on the map (automatically generated by OpenStreetMap): High Street, Poverest, Greater London
Report on FixMyStreet

item.title: Graffiti on the waste bin, 6th April
item.description:
Graffiti on the waste bin

Nearest road to the pin placed on the map (automatically generated by OpenStreetMap): Kent Road, Poverest, Greater London
Report on FixMyStreet

item.title: Fridge freezer blocking footpath, 6th April
item.description:
Fridge freezer blocking footpath for about one week

Nearest address to the pin placed on the map (from OS Places API): Elliscombe Road, Charlton
Report on FixMyStreet

item.title: Brick wall has been damaged, 6th April
item.description:
Brick wall has been damaged

Nearest road to the pin placed on the map (automatically generated by OpenStreetMap): Station Approach, Poverest, Greater London
Report on FixMyStreet

item.title: Large open bucket of oil left. Flammable., 6th April
item.description:
Has been left here in the last hour.

Nearest address to the pin placed on the map (from OS Places API): Cleanthus Road, Plumstead
Report on FixMyStreet

item.title: New fencing has been broken I assume so kids can get to the river?, 6th April
item.description:
New fencing has been broken I assume so kids can get to the river?

Nearest road to the pin placed on the map (automatically generated by OpenStreetMap): High Street, Poverest, Greater London
Report on FixMyStreet

item.title: Pedestrians/cycling sign, 6th April
item.description:
Sign vandalised

Nearest road to the pin placed on the map (automatically generated by OpenStreetMap): Ilderton Road, Bermondsey, Greater London
Report on FixMyStreet

item.title: 134 Brondesbury Road, 6th April
item.description:
Someone dumped old carpet in black bins on the pavement by the green BT exchange box. Plus there are now few other small items and cigarette buds that need sweeping. Thank you

Nearest address to the pin placed on the map (from OS Places API): Salusbury Road, London
Report on FixMyStreet
item.category: Fly-tip Medium - Up to medium size van load

item.title: Sign facing wrong way, 6th April
item.description:
Hi, the zone ends sign on lothian is facing wrong way and needs to be straightened please

Nearest road to the pin placed on the map (automatically generated by OpenStreetMap): 198, Lothian Road, Loughborough Junction, Greater London
Report on FixMyStreet

item.title: Big sofa and matress, 6th April
item.description:
We have been clearing lots of fly tipping previously please have a look in to it people come and throw all the rubbish here it’s been going on for nearly 6 months many thanks

Nearest road to the pin placed on the map (automatically generated by OpenStreetMap): 1-15, Vale End, Greater London
Report on FixMyStreet

item.title: Fly Tipped Bed Base, 6th April
item.description:
This bed base has been fly tipped near the entrance of the nugent (hobby craft side)

Nearest road to the pin placed on the map (automatically generated by OpenStreetMap): 99, High Street, Poverest, Greater London
Report on FixMyStreet

item.title: Corner of Douglas Road & Willesden Lane, 6th April
item.description:
Duvan bed with drawers, mattress and wooden panels, dumped in parking space on Douglas Road. Moved onto the pavement and propped up against the wall to allow access

Nearest address to the pin placed on the map (from OS Places API): Willesden Lane, Kilburn, London
Report on FixMyStreet
item.category: Fly-tip Large - More than a van load

item.title: Bollard knocked over, 6th April
item.description:
Sydenham Hill In the cycle lane outside Porlock House Bollard has been knocked over. This section has Southwark Street lighting

Nearest road to the pin placed on the map (automatically generated by OpenStreetMap): 28a, Sydenham Hill, Forest Hill, Greater London
Report on FixMyStreet

item.title: Nitrous oxide canisters, 6th April
item.description:
Two boxes of nitrous oxide canisters left by 51 bus stop at Westwood Lane near Wendover Way junction.

Nearest road to the pin placed on the map (automatically generated by OpenStreetMap): Westwood Lane, Blackfen, Greater London
Report on FixMyStreet

item.title: Blinds Fly Tipped, 6th April
item.description:
Blinds have been fly tipped outside this house, please can we get it removed

Nearest road to the pin placed on the map (automatically generated by OpenStreetMap): Wellington Road, Poverest, Orpington, Greater London
Report on FixMyStreet
